content:
# Background Worker — Decisions (March 2026)

## Execution
In-process tokio::spawn task inside corvia serve. Default interval: 60 minutes. Configurable via forgetting.interval_minutes.

## GC Cycle
1. Load entries per scope (paginated, 1000/page)
2. Compute retention_score, check inactivity policy, compare tier thresholds
3. Apply transitions: Hot→Warm (tier field), Warm→Cold (+ HNSW orphan), Cold→Forgotten (+ discard embedding + archive)
4. Single HNSW rebuild at end if any Warm→Cold transitions
5. Apply budget policy if scope exceeds budget_top_n
6. Emit metrics

## Safeguards
- Pinned: skip entirely
- Auto-protected: can demote but not Forget
- Rate limit: max 50 Forgotten transitions per cycle
- Circuit breaker: abort if >50% Redb writes fail
- Idempotent: crash-safe, next run re-evaluates all

## v1 Constraints
No compaction, no LLM calls, no cross-scope analysis, no deletion. Purely deterministic.
